scenes.title: Empty
scenes.description: Blank domain. Use right-click menus to add sources, boundaries, and drawn materials.

scenes.title: Plane wave in air
scenes.description: Atlas 1: homogeneous air with a continuous line source.

scenes.title: Plane wave in dielectric
scenes.description: Atlas 2: full dielectric domain, n = 1.5, to show shorter wavelength and slower phase velocity.

scenes.title: Gaussian pulse in free space
scenes.description: Atlas 3: Gaussian pulse in free space with absorbing boundaries.

scenes.title: Two-source interference
scenes.description: Atlas 4: two coherent point Jz sources separated by about 1.5 lambda0.

scenes.title: Two-frequency beat
scenes.description: Atlas 5: two nearby CW frequencies to reveal a beat envelope.

scenes.title: Single slit diffraction
scenes.description: Atlas 6: PEC screen with one subwavelength slit.

scenes.title: Double slit
scenes.description: Atlas 7: PEC screen with two slits for Young-type interference.

scenes.title: Circular aperture
scenes.description: Atlas 8: 2D circular aperture cut into a PEC screen.

scenes.title: TEz/TMz comparison
scenes.description: Atlas 9: TEz/TMz comparison on the same air-dielectric interface, using a dual-polarization angular sweep.

scenes.title: Poynting vector
scenes.description: Atlas 10: oblique plane wave shown as Poynting flux with vector arrows.

scenes.title: Evanescent isolated wave
scenes.description: Atlas 11: isolated evanescent wave with explicit k_parallel/k0 > 1 and exponential decay away from the source line.

scenes.title: CPML absorption check
scenes.description: Atlas 12: pulsed source aimed at the absorbing boundary for reflection checks.

scenes.description: Atlas 14: oblique Gaussian beam on an air-dielectric interface.

scenes.description: Atlas 16: TE/TM Brewster comparison with dual numerical angular sweeps and analytic Fresnel references.

scenes.title: Frustrated TIR

scenes.description: Atlas 61: high-index cylinder for Mie-like resonances.

scenes.description: Atlas 81: 1D periodic Bragg stack.

scenes.description: Atlas 123: region tagged with sinusoidal epsilon modulation and reduced Floquet sideband analysis.

scenes.description: Atlas 137: Huygens source coupled to a dielectric cavity/resonator with reduced cavity-overlap proxy.

scenes.description: Atlas 139: Valley-Hall channel with traveling modulation, approximate isolation, reduced sideband S_m readout, and modulation-phase proxy.

scenes.title: Space-time crystal
scenes.description: Atlas 140: space-time crystal analogue with traveling epsilon modulation, reduced Floquet sideband readout, and modulation-phase proxy.
